001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.repository;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.AcceptedState;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.IssueReport;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.IssueType;
006import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.UserProfile;
007import java.time.Instant;
008import java.util.List;
009import java.util.Optional;
010import java.util.UUID;
011import org.springframework.data.domain.Sort;
012import org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository;
013
014/**
015 * Spring Data repository for {@link IssueReport} persistence operations.
016 */
017public interface IssueReportRepository extends JpaRepository<IssueReport, Long> {
018
019  /**
020   * Finds an issue report by external identifier.
021   *
022   * @param externalId report external ID.
023   * @return optional containing the report if found.
024   */
025  Optional<IssueReport> findByExternalId(UUID externalId);
026
027  /**
028   * Finds issue reports for a user profile with the specified sort order.
029   *
030   * @param userProfile report owner.
031   * @param sort sort order.
032   * @return matching issue reports.
033   */
034  List<IssueReport> findByUserProfile(UserProfile userProfile, Sort sort);
035
036  /**
037   * Returns a user's reports ordered by first-reported time descending.
038   *
039   * @param userProfile report owner.
040   * @return matching issue reports.
041   */
042  List<IssueReport> getIssueReportsByUserProfileOrderByTimeFirstReportedDesc(
043      UserProfile userProfile);
044
045  /**
046   * Returns reports in a specific accepted state ordered by first-reported time descending.
047   *
048   * @param acceptedState accepted state.
049   * @return matching issue reports.
050   */
051  List<IssueReport> getIssueReportsByAcceptedStateOrderByTimeFirstReportedDesc(
052      AcceptedState acceptedState);
053
054  /**
055   * Returns reports associated with the provided issue types ordered by first-reported time descending.
056   *
057   * @param issueTypes issue types.
058   * @return matching issue reports.
059   */
060  List<IssueReport> getIssueReportsByIssueTypesOrderByTimeFirstReportedDesc(
061      List<IssueType> issueTypes);
062
063  /**
064   * Returns reports whose last-modified time is within the provided range.
065   *
066   * @param timeLastModifiedAfter start of range (inclusive/exclusive depends on generated query).
067   * @param timeLastModifiedBefore end of range.
068   * @return matching issue reports.
069   */
070  List<IssueReport> getIssueReportsByTimeLastModifiedBetween(
071      Instant timeLastModifiedAfter, Instant timeLastModifiedBefore);
072}
